title: thymus broussonetii subsp. broussonetii
intro: Thymus broussonetii subsp. broussonetii, also known as the Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus broussonetii plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Thymus broussonetii subsp. broussonetii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Thymus broussonetii subsp. broussonetii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
